name: Original Old Mexico Guacamole Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the avocados and remove any pits (seeds). Mash the avocado flesh with a fork until smooth.
2. Add the diced tomatoes and chopped onions to the mashed avocado. Stir gently to combine.
3. Mix in the lemon juice to taste.
4. Serve over lettuce leaves.
